who: HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto for payroll processing
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto processing 10–50 employee benefits enrollments/month, missed updates cause compliance issues. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking employee benefit enrollment changes in a timely manner.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tool sharing
try_it: Let users try Monthly alerts for benefit enrollment changes and User-friendly dashboard for tracking changes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
